artifacts.name: Scarab of Swiftness
artifacts.description: A golden scarab enchanted by Djinn mages. Grants the bearer unnatural speed.

artifacts.name: Crown of the Fallen Pharaoh
artifacts.description: The ancient crown of Umm'Natur's first king. Amplifies all death magic.

artifacts.name: Ankh of Protection
artifacts.description: An obsidian ankh radiating protective desert magic.
